arts.ttl: Wolves increasingly looked to have secured one for future – International recognition for rising star
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers youngster Hugo Bueno’s loan spell at Feyenoord is continuing to go from strength to strength, with this week seeing him called up to the Spanish youth squad. 1908.nl cover the situation today, reporting that the Wolves loanee ‘deserves election’ for the Spanish side, whose manager Santiago Denia Sanchez has included him in his The post Wolves increasingly looked to have secured one for future – International recognition for rising star appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Team News: Southampton vs. Wolverhampton Wanderers injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Southampton and Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: 'The Premier League is about being consistent'
arts.sum: But with a game against the team currently bottom of the Premier League standings, Pereira insists that his players understand they are facing another difficult test. “We must increase our level, looking for our game, our game model, and increase every time, to not concede goals, to increase the set-pieces, trying to create more dynamics to score goals, appear on the box to score, creating moments in the space to score, finishing the plays – these are all things we need to improve every day.”

arts.ttl: 'We've been feeling very solid with this formation'
arts.sum: “But we know that we have a strong team, and we're going to try to be very well organised and take the best ideas that the coach is telling us during the beginning of the week to the game and go there to take the three points.” The defender, who has been in impressive form this season – but especially since the arrival of compatriot Vitor Pereira – believes the squad are not going to underestimate Saints, but will be doing everything they can to pick up what would be a vitally important three points in their own push for survival.

arts.ttl: Wolves transfer news: Palmeiras youngster targeted in €6m deal?
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are allegedly planning to make a €6m (£5.05m) offer for a Palmeiras youngster during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: ‘Interpreted as new message’ – Wolves player thought to have given social media transfer hint
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers’ Gonçalo Guedes is eyeing a move to Valencia. That’s according to Orgullo Biri, who state the 28-year-old aims to be the La Liga side’s big signing in the summer window. The attacking midfielder spent five years at Valencia before moving to Wolves in August 2022.
